name: M4A1消音版 | 黑水
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been painted in an aquatic-stripe pattern with charcoal metallic paints of various reflectivities over a chrome base coat. Water gives life, but it can also take it...
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器以铬为外表，配上水栖条纹图案，然后使用拥有不同反射率的木炭金属涂料进行了涂装。 水能载舟，亦能覆舟…
